mentions.note: CEO Len Schleifer on show April 2005; early-stage biotech; $1,000 investment became $1,501,000+ by 2024; blockbuster macular degeneration drug; prime example of scalability.
Pharma leader with CEO Len Schleifer executing well; stock breaking out; forward P/E 18-19, PEG ratio 1.6, rising earnings, strong pipeline; Cramer most bullish pharma pick alongside Amgen.
Biotech; Cramer regrets not buying at JPMorgan conference; much better drug story vs. peers (except Eli Lilly). Implied positive view despite casual tone.
Biotech with strong earnings; must own if diversifying away from speculative positions; solid fundamentals, not a drag.
Dupixent $1M+ patient franchise, 8 indications; Eylea-HD $2B run rate; Liptio skin cancer breakthrough; Proluent + GLP-1 combo potential game-changer for obese patients with elevated LDL.
